user.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera
user.description:
Enter your Bearer token from the Bosch Smart Home Camera app.

How to get the token:
1. Install mitmproxy: pip3 install mitmproxy
2. Run: mitmdump --listen-host YOUR_IP --listen-port 8890
3. Set your iPhone WiFi proxy → Manual → YOUR_IP:8890
4. Visit http://mitm.it on the phone → install CA cert → enable Certificate Trust
5. Force-close and reopen the Bosch Smart Home Camera app
6. Copy the Bearer token from the terminal output

The token expires every ~1 hour. Refresh it anytime via Settings → Integrations → Bosch Smart Home Camera → Configure.

error.token_expired: Token expired or invalid. Capture a fresh token from the Bosch app.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Bosch cloud API. Check your internet connection.
error.connection_error: Network error. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: Bosch Smart Home Camera is already configured.

init.title: Bosch Camera — Options
init.description:
Configure features and optionally refresh your Bearer token.
Leave the token field blank to keep the existing token.

data.bearer_token: Bearer Token (leave blank to keep current)
data.enable_sensors: Enable status & event sensors (Status / Last Event / Events Today)
data.enable_snapshot_button: Enable control buttons (Refresh Snapshot / Open Live Stream)
data.enable_auto_download: Auto-download all event files in background

error.token_expired: Token is still expired. Capture a fresh token from the Bosch app.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Bosch cloud API.

trigger_snapshot.name: Trigger Snapshot Refresh
trigger_snapshot.description: Force an immediate snapshot refresh for all Bosch cameras.

open_live_connection.name: Open Live Connection
open_live_connection.description: Try to establish a live stream proxy connection for a Bosch camera.

camera_id.name: Camera ID
camera_id.description: Cloud ID of the camera (e.g. xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx)
